response.global_analysis: Confirmed the audio matches the HoneyWorks song 'Fansa' (ファンサ). The first 51 seconds of the video are a non-vocal interlude; per the Golden Rule, I am remaining silent during this period. Subtitles begin exactly when the vocals start at 02:44.800. Timestamps are tightly wrapped to the vocal audio to prevent cascading delays, and mid-sentence pauses are handled by splitting blocks.

subtitles.original: 好きになって もっと
恩返しは 愛のこもった投げキッスで
subtitles.english: I'll repay you with a blow kiss full of love!

subtitles.english: It's not your imagination, our eyes met.

subtitles.english: Make a heart and please fall in love with me.

subtitles.original: やれること 何でもします
NGなしで 体当たり挑戦
subtitles.english: with no 'no-go's,' giving it my all.

subtitles.english: But it's okay, because when I stand here, you're all with me.
